assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' subheading appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), with content 'No limitations known for any Serena instance.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-13: '## Step 2 — Serena Instance Discovery' states 'Discovered 2 Serena instances by scanning for `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern:' followed by '`serena_backend`' and '`serena_ui`' with their respective tool lists, sourced from 'MCP tool listing (`mcp-tools-with-serena.md`)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 1-5: 'This is a greenfield setup. The existing CLAUDE.md (`claude-md-empty.md`) had no `# Project Configuration` section. All configuration sections were created new.' All subsections are marked '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)', '## Jira Configuration (new)', '## Code Intelligence (new)'. The 'Preserved' section (lines 39-41) only mentions preserving existing non-config content ('project heading, Documentation section, Getting Started section'), not any pre-existing configuration entries.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' — exact column names match the required structure

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 8 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 37: '## Step 8 — Security Configuration' with 'User declined security triage setup. Section not created.' changes-log.md line 46: '## Security Configuration — user declined security triage setup.' claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section (file ends at line 33 with the Limitations content).
